arg.line: storage blob list --container-name lfr-qa-poshi-test-${azure.container.id} --account-name isit35689storage --prefix ${companyId}/${groupId} --output table --connection-string ${azure.connection.string}

storage blob list --container-name lfr-qa-poshi-test-${azure.container.id} --account-name isit35689storage --prefix ${companyId}/${groupId} --output table --connection-string ${azure.connection.string}
storage container create -n lfr-qa-poshi-test-${azure.container.id} --public-access container --account-name isit35689storage --connection-string ${azure.connection.string}
